subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Abhá Kingdom! Thou hast entered, through the loving-kindness of the Best-Beloved of the worlds, into this supreme Paradise and manifest felicity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی در این بهشت برین و نعیم مبین که بعنایت محبوب عالمین وارد
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
